caption: A screen recording displays a presentation about the "Rural Community Food System" within a web browser. A man with a beard and a baseball cap is visible in a small webcam feed in the top right corner. The main content features a slide titled "Introduction," which poses the question, "What constitutes a sustainable localized food system for a rural community source as local as possible from locally owned and operated to benefit the community." The slide includes a section for "Session Videos" with various dates and a "References" section mentioning "Large Corporate Farm System." A complex system map with nodes and connecting lines occupies the right side of the slide, featuring labels like "Local Sustainable Consumption" and "Product Cost/Price." As the video progresses, a cursor moves across the screen, eventually highlighting a specific node labeled "3 source local based on Price" and "Availability."
